source: Manny , the marina 's manager , had grinned from ear to handsome ear when Faye told him she needed something bigger . domestication: 曼尼是码头的经理，他听说菲伊需要更大的船时，从耳朵到耳朵都咧开嘴笑了。然后，他伸出一只像桃花心木一样的黑手，把一头长长的辫子拨到宽阔的肩膀后面，露出三枚大环状耳环和一个钻石耳钉。他说：“让我带你去看看我租给那些有钱的美国渔民的船。像你这样漂亮的女老板应该享受豪华的待遇。”他说这话时脸上带着灿烂的笑容，就好像在说：好马配好鞍，漂亮的女人坐豪华的船才配得上。

source: In the hall , reaching for the dining room switch , she smelled hills-dry , spicy chaparral-along with a wet-dog stink . She stepped back . Normal night noises drifted in : distant traffic , a mockingbird 's complicated song . In the faint , chill glow from some outside light she could make out the rosewood table surrounded by its ladder-back chairs , and the Venetian glass vase holding pale , blowsy roses . Beyond the table rose a furry shoulder , a long neck and large , pricked ears .
domestication: 她伸手去客厅里的灯开关时，一股燥热的山丘气息和带有湿狗臭味的刺激性灌木丛气味扑鼻而来，她不禁退了回去。夜晚的宁静声响从外面传来：远处的车流声，一只嘲鸫鸟复杂的歌声。在从屋外透进来的微弱、寒冷的光线下，她可以辨认出那张被梯形椅子围绕着的紫檀木餐桌，还有那只威尼斯玻璃花瓶中装着的淡色、凌乱的玫瑰。在桌子以外，一个毛茸茸的肩膀，一条长脖子和两只竖起的耳朵若隐若现。

“我知道，我知道，”亚历克萨打断了对方的话，她不想听。由于她一生下来就是个富家孩子，因此她不得不淡化自己的财富，以免朋友们会感到嫉妒。“但这不是他平常的控制欲望，你知道吗？更像是他害怕会发生什么事情。”

source: " Fuck . You can work for me if you want . But , you know , Marsha , you do n't have to work for that . " Ace grins . She puts one hand on her hip and tilts her head . Her mouth is relaxed , and I notice its full shape for the first time , puffy and ripe-looking , almost trembling . source: Powderly , Terence Vincent ( 1849-1924 ) , head of the Knights of Labor from 1879-1893 , appointed US Commissioner General of Immigration by President McKinley , a position he held from 1897-1902 , during which time he instituted the first restrictions against immigrants with contagious eye diseases .
domestication: 庞德利，特伦斯·文森特（1849-1924），美国劳工骑士团的领袖，从1879年到1893年任职。在麦金莱总统的任命下，他从1897年到1902年担任美国移民局局长。在他的任期内，他推出了针对患有传染性眼疾的移民的第一批限制措施。这个人在历史上也算是个风云人物，他领导的劳工骑士团是当时美国最大的劳工组织，他后来又去当官，还是专门管移民的。

source: It was not a hotel . It was a kind of pension where , at the most , there were four or five guests . In the morning , breakfast on a tray was placed on a shelf in the corridor : bread , butter , honey , and slices of a sausage that is a specialty of the city . Beside the tray , there were packets of Nescafe and an electric kettle . Contact with the severe and serene young women who ran the place was minimal .

这不是一家酒店，而是一种兼营客房的地方，里面最多有四、五位客人。早晨，托盘里的早餐被放在走廊的架子上：面包，黄油，蜂蜜和几片这种城市的特色香肠。托盘旁边有一些雀巢咖啡包和一个电水壶。与经营这个地方的严肃而宁静的年轻女性接触很少。

source: Vercingetorix : I have just learned that the Druids are sacrificing my father to the gods and have proclaimed me king of the Gauls in his place . I expected their punishment of him , but I never imagined that they would give me their blessing and support . I mourn his death , but rejoice that I am free to fight the Romans .
domestication: 维钦托利：我刚刚得知，德鲁伊教徒把我父亲作为祭品献给神灵，并宣布我是高卢人的新王。虽然我早就料到他们会对我父亲进行惩罚，但我从没想到他们会给予我祝福和支持。我为父亲的死而哀悼，但我为能够自由地与罗马人战斗而感到高兴。毕竟，天上不养闲人，我现在有了新的责任，自然要勇敢地承担起来。

source: There was n't a rustle in the sanctuary , though hosts of enthused Amenls came from every corner of the congregation to echo under the high A-framed ceiling . In one muscular hand Jones hefted a black leather Bible . His other hand trembled on his outstretched arm , snapping into a colossal fist that pounded the air , or else jabbing a blunt forefinger heavenward . He closed his eyes , threw his head back , his thick neck flexed , and sweat beaded his temples and throat . The altar seemed to quake . Shouted Hallelujahis sprang from the pews with a profusion that bristled every tiny hair on the back of Jeffrey 's neck . He too shouted the word and punched the air in front of him with a spirited uppercut .
domestication: 教堂里鸦雀无声，尽管来自会众各个角落的热情教徒们高喊着阿门，声音在高高的三角形天花板下回荡。琼斯用一只结实的手举着一本黑色皮革圣经，另一只手则颤抖着伸出，猛然握成一个巨大的拳头，重重地击打空气，有时还会直指苍天。 他闭上眼睛，仰起头，他那粗壮的脖子紧绷着，额头和脖子上冒出了汗珠。祭坛似乎也在发抖。教众们从长椅上跳起来，高喊着哈利路亚，这阵势让杰弗里的后颈毛都立了起来。他也跟着大声喊出了哈利路亚，并且用力地挥拳击向前方。这种情景让他兴奋不已。
foreignization: 教堂里一片寂静，尽管满怀热情的“阿门”声从会众的每个角落响起，回荡在高高的A形屋顶下。琼斯用他那肌肉发达的一只手端着一本黑色皮革圣经。他的另一只手在伸出的手臂上颤抖着，突然握成一个巨大的拳头敲打空气，有时还会猛地指向上天。他闭上了眼睛，仰起头，他粗壮的脖子也跟着紧绷起来，汗珠从他的太阳穴和喉咙滴落下来。祭坛似乎都在颤抖着。“哈利路亚”的欢呼声像雨点般从长椅上爆发出来，使得杰弗里的脖子后面的每一根细毛都竖了起来。他也喊出了这句话，并且用力挥出一记上勾拳，击打着他面前的空气。

source: I remember the time when my mother tried to kill herself . No one ever spoke of it as such , but at that age I was old enough to put it together . I recall the ambulance coming to our house , the men trying to put her on a stretcher and her just aware enough to struggle with them-flailing her arms when they lifted her , her mumbled protests through lips that seemed claylike and unnatural , moving like a badly dubbed Japanese film . " No , no , no , " she said . " No , no . " I think now that she must have taken an overdose of pills .
domestication: 我记得那次妈妈想不开，想自杀的事。虽然从来没有人明确地说出来过，但当时我已经足够大了，能够把事情的前因后果拼凑起来。我清楚地记得，救护车开到我们家门口，医护人员试图把她抬上担架，而她仍然有意识地挣扎着，不让他们抬她，她乱挥着双臂，嘴里含糊不清地抗议着，嘴唇像泥塑的，没有任何生气，就像是一部配音很差的日本片。“不，不，不，”她说，“不，不。”现在我想，她应该是服用了过量的药物。

source: " The trunk , " he said . Apparently it was up to her to get it down by herself . She tugged it to the tailgate and let it drop , splot ! into the mud . Only then did he take the other end . Together they struggled with it , sliding and almost falling , until they propped it up on the stone wall like a tombstone . The hem of her dress was already heavy with mud .
domestication: “是箱子，”他说，话里明显的意思是让她自己动手去拿下来。于是她使劲拉着箱子到车后盖，然后就这样“扑通”一声把它扔进了泥泞里。直到这时，他才来帮忙提起另一头。他们一起拖着箱子，滑倒几次差点摔个跟头，最后才把它像墓碑一样竖在石头墙上。她的裙摆已经被泥巴粘得沉甸甸的了。

source: The call was from a company selling something and was a trivial interruption . Yet as Marjorie walked back through the dining room , she caught sight of the wet towel Mark had flung over the back of one of the chairs . Her discovery of it -- of the bleached stain it had left on the antique wood -- made her take a sharp breath . She was not annoyed so much as frightened by his carelessness . In that instant she decided to pretend that the call had been important .
domestication: 接到电话，原来是推销公司打来的，纯属无聊之举。可是当玛乔丽从餐厅走回去的时候，她瞥见马克随手往椅背一丢的湿毛巾。这一眼不仅看到了毛巾，还看到它在古董家具上留下的一块漂白斑。玛乔丽倒吸一口气，心中既没生气，也不沮丧，只是对马克的粗心感到害怕。当时她就想出了个主意，要装作刚才那电话很重要。
foreignization: 电话是来自一家公司的销售推销，是一个微不足道的打断。然而，当Marjorie走回餐厅时，她瞥见了Mark随手搭在椅子背上的湿毛巾。发现它——它在古董木上留下的漂白污渍——让她深吸了一口气。她并不是那么生气，而是被他的粗心大意吓到了。在那一刻，她决定假装这通电话很重要。

source: Alice stepped quietly into the room and the deer sprang straight up-it was almost comical how her skinny , knobbed knees with their coin-sized worn spots lifted into view . She twisted as if to reverse direction , knocked framed pictures off the wall and slammed a shoulder into the wainscoting . Chairs toppled and sound funneled back into the room . The deer was snorting , a noise part whistle , part shriek . Her hooves , like tiny cleft plastic slippers , lost purchase on the waxed hardwood , and she sprawled out on the floor . Alice 's heart boomed .
domestication: 爱丽丝悄无声息地走进房间，鹿突然跳了起来，几乎有点好笑的是，她细长的膝盖上有小巧的磨损斑点，一下子暴露在视线中。她好像要转身，结果把墙上的相框打落在地，还把肩膀撞到了镶板上。椅子倒了一地，声音涌回房间。鹿发出了一声哨声般的尖叫，它的蹄子像小小的裂开的塑料拖鞋一样，在抛光的硬木地板上失去了抓力，然后它摔倒在地上。爱丽丝的心跳得很剧烈。
foreignization: 爱丽丝轻步走进房间，鹿突然跳了起来——当它瘦小、骨节嶙峋的膝盖上的硬币大小的磨损斑块进入视野时，几乎有些可笑。她扭转身体，仿佛想要改变方向，碰倒了挂在墙上的相框，并把肩膀撞到了镶板上。椅子倒下，声音倒流回房间。鹿发出哨声，一种部分像口哨，部分像尖叫的声音。她的蹄子像小小的裂开的塑料拖鞋，失去了在抛光硬木地板上的摩擦力，她摔倒在地上。爱丽丝的心脏砰砰跳动。

The deer was snorting , a noise part whistle , part shriek . Her hooves , like tiny cleft plastic slippers , lost purchase on the waxed hardwood , and she sprawled out on the floor . Alice 's heart boomed .

source: Through the window , a large bird caught Sasha 's eye as he floated onto the porch rail . His blue iridescent head and bright eyes glistened in the sun . The colors , including his jet-black body , reminded her of one of the dramatic costumes she 'd worn during a solo performance in Venice . Organza , chiffon , tulle , beads , the music She fingered a bit of the satin that trimmed her shawl , recalled the exact tiara she wore for the sequence .

source: It 's not the things you can replace that matter . Everyone who knew Grace or read about the fire , sent her something soft and warm to make up for a lifetime of possessions , to ease the ache . Instead of old spices and old love letters , old things from a not always sweet married life , she now could turn her attention to the boxes of afghans , sweaters , socks and mufflers that inundated the neighbor 's house , where she was staying . Two dozen pairs of army surplus green socks .
domestication: 并不是那些可以被替代的东西才最重要。每个人都知道格蕾丝或听说过那场大火后，都给她送来了些柔软温暖的东西，以弥补一生中所失去的财物，来缓解她的心痛。不再是旧的香料和旧的情书，不再是来自不总是幸福的婚姻生活的旧物，现在她可以将注意力转移到那些淹没了她寄住的邻居家的盒子里：阿富汗毯子、毛衣、袜子和围巾。足有两打双陆军剩余的绿色袜子。
foreignization: 重要的不是那些可以被取代的东西。 每个人都知道格雷斯，或者读到过她遭遇大火的报道，都寄给她一些柔软和温暖的东西，以弥补一生中失去的财物，来缓解痛苦。 与其说是旧香料和旧情书，来自并不总是幸福的婚姻生活的老物件，不如说现在她可以将注意力转移到那些充满邻居家里，她正在那里停留的阿富汗毯子、毛衣、袜子和围巾的盒子上。 二十几双军剩余的绿色袜子。

source: In the mornings , we took breakfast in a barricaded cafe near Gloucester Road . Food was rationed . Those without a sweet tooth gave their sugar rations to others . Ken and I drank tea , for it was better than the coffee essence . Over breakfast we read newspapers . Each consisted of four or , at the most , six pages .
domestication: 早上，我们在靠近格洛斯特路的一家被封锁的咖啡馆里吃早餐。 当时食物都定量供应，没甜牙的人便会把自己的糖分配给他人。肯和我喝茶，因为比所谓的咖啡精更好些。边吃早餐，我们还会看报纸，每份报纸只有四到六页。

source: That summer , I got stoned , sat on my porch , tried to figure out where everyone had gone . Across the street , guys with whistles were running a girls ' soccer camp , which I could watch if I was n't too obvious . The girls were sweet and clumsy . They lacked the essentials of the sport-the ability to steal and confront and tackle-but their legs enjoyed flirting with these ideas . I was supposed to be writing a dissertation .
domestication: 那年夏天，我整天迷迷糊糊地坐在门廊上，想知道大家都去哪儿了。街对面，一些带着哨子的男人正在办一个女孩足球训练营，我可以偷偷往那里看，只要我不太招眼就行。那些女孩很可爱，也很笨拙。她们缺乏这项运动的基本功——狡猾、抗衡和冲撞——但她们的腿却很享受地试探这些动作。我本应该在写论文。
foreignization: 那年夏天，我吸了大麻，坐在门廊上，试图弄清楚所有人都去哪里了。在街对面，有哨子声的男人们正在经营一个女孩足球训练营，如果我不是太明显的话，我可以观看。那些女孩很甜蜜也很笨拙。她们缺乏运动的基本要素——偷球、对抗和阻挡的能力——但她们的腿喜欢与这些想法调情。我应该在写论文。

source: " Geoff ? " A hand was in the air , bunched into a fist . It belonged to Ginny Stern , whose kid , Jason , was the precocious darling of Petey 's class . Why should n't he be ? He had a bright , principled , outspoken mother who took him to museums on the weekend and to France in the summer so he 'd grow up bilingual , and the presence of whose hand in the air just now did not bode well , Bonnie thought , for the pace of the evening .
domestication: “杰夫？”有人举起了拳头，这只手属于吉妮·斯特恩，她的孩子杰森是皮蒂班上的神童。难怪他这么出色嘛，他妈妈是个有胆识、有原则、言辞犀利的人，周末带他去博物馆，暑假带他去法国玩，这样他长大后就能说两种语言。现在，她的手举起来了，邦妮想，这对今晚的节奏可不妙。
foreignization: “杰夫？” 一只手举到了空中，握成拳头。这只手属于吉妮·斯特恩（Ginny Stern），她的孩子杰森（Jason）是皮蒂（Petey）班上早熟的宠儿。他为什么不应该这样呢？他有一个聪明、有原则、嘴巴快的母亲，她周末带他去博物馆，夏天带他去法国，这样他就能长大后成为一个会说两种语言的人，而她现在把手举到空中的行为，邦妮（Bonnie）认为，对于晚上的进程来说，不是个好兆头。

source: The years passed . The last time I saw him , we drove all night with a friend of mine , from London to Geneva . In a forest near Chatillon-sur-Seine , we heard Coltrane playing " My Favorite Things " on the radio . It was during this journey that Ken told me he was returning to New Zealand . He was then sixty-five . I did n't ask him why , because I did n't want to hear him say : To die .
domestication: 岁月匆匆流逝，我已经记不清我最后一次见到他是什么时候了，大概是某个夜晚，我和一位朋友从伦敦开车去日内瓦的途中吧。在靠近沙蒂永苏尔塞讷的一片树林旁，我们听到收音机里播放着科尔特兰演奏的《我最喜欢的事物》。就在那次旅途中，肯告诉我他要回新西兰了。当时他已经六十五岁高龄了。我没有问他为什么，因为我不想听他说：回去等死。
foreignization: 岁月流逝，我最后一次见到他时，我们和我的一个朋友一起从伦敦开车前往日内瓦，一路夜行。在沙蒂永苏朗塞讷附近的一片森林中，我们在收音机里听到科尔特雷恩演奏《我最喜欢的事物》。正是在这次旅途中，肯告诉我他将回到新西兰。当时他已经六十五岁了。我没有问他为什么，因为我不想听到他说：去死。

He was then sixty-five . I did n't ask him why , because I did n't want to hear him say : To die .

source: When we return to the classroom , I notice how all of the people move , what they are wearing , and , most of all , I wonder why they are here . One man in his early forties with a nice goofy smile wants to get a permit for target shooting . Another man , a real estate lawyer , deals with abandoned properties in local neighborhoods and wants to be armed as he prowls around these areas . When he mentions that he has a daughter in college , Jim moves to his next subject . " So . your daughter is shopping at the mall , big sales at Old Navy . She walks out to the parking lot in the dark . Make sure she has one of these . Okay ? "
domestication: 我们回到课堂，我注意到所有人如何移动，他们穿着什么，尤其是，我想知道他们为什么来这里。一个四十出头的男人带着傻乎乎的笑容，想要拿到射击许可证。另一个男人是一名房地产律师，他处理当地街区废弃的房产，并想在他巡视这些地区时拥有枪支。当他提到他有一个大学里的女儿时，吉姆转到了下一个话题。“那么，你的女儿在商场购物，Old Navy的大甩卖。她走出停车场，在黑暗中。确保她有一件这样的东西，好吗？”吉姆说这话时，神情严肃，好像是在警告所有做父亲的人，要保护好自己的女儿。
foreignization: 当我们回到教室，我注意到所有的人如何移动，他们穿着什么，尤其是，我想知道他们为什么在这里。一个四十多岁的男人，有一个很傻的笑容，想要得到一份用于目标射击的许可证。另一个男人，是一名房地产律师，他处理当地社区废弃的房产，并且希望在他巡逻这些地区时携带武器。当他提到他有一个大学的女儿时，吉姆转移到他的下一个话题。“那么，你的女儿正在商场购物，旧海军陆战队有大甩卖。她走到停车场，天黑了。确保她有一支手枪。好了吗？”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When we return to the classroom , I notice how all of the people move , what they are wearing , and , most of all , I wonder why they are here . One man in his early forties with a nice goofy smile wants to get a permit for target shooting . Another man , a real estate lawyer , deals with abandoned properties in local neighborhoods and wants to be armed as he prowls around these areas . When he mentions that he has a daughter in college , Jim moves to his next subject . " So . your daughter is shopping at the mall , big sales at Old Navy . She walks out to the parking lot in the dark . Make sure she has one of these . Okay ? "

我们回到课堂，我注意到所有人如何移动，他们穿着什么，尤其是，我想知道他们为什么来这里。一个四十出头的男人带着傻乎乎的笑容，想要拿到射击许可证。另一个男人是一名房地产律师，他处理当地街区废弃的房产，并想在他巡视这些地区时拥有枪支。当他提到他有一个大学里的女儿时，吉姆转到了下一个话题。“那么，你的女儿在商场购物，Old Navy的大甩卖。她走出停车场，在黑暗中。确保她有一件这样的东西，好吗？”吉姆说这话时，神情严肃，好像是在警告所有做父亲的人，要保护好自己的女儿。

messages_foreignization.content:

When we return to the classroom , I notice how all of the people move , what they are wearing , and , most of all , I wonder why they are here . One man in his early forties with a nice goofy smile wants to get a permit for target shooting . Another man , a real estate lawyer , deals with abandoned properties in local neighborhoods and wants to be armed as he prowls around these areas . When he mentions that he has a daughter in college , Jim moves to his next subject . " So . your daughter is shopping at the mall , big sales at Old Navy . She walks out to the parking lot in the dark . Make sure she has one of these . Okay ? "

当我们回到教室，我注意到所有的人如何移动，他们穿着什么，尤其是，我想知道他们为什么在这里。一个四十多岁的男人，有一个很傻的笑容，想要得到一份用于目标射击的许可证。另一个男人，是一名房地产律师，他处理当地社区废弃的房产，并且希望在他巡逻这些地区时携带武器。当他提到他有一个大学的女儿时，吉姆转移到他的下一个话题。“那么，你的女儿正在商场购物，旧海军陆战队有大甩卖。她走到停车场，天黑了。确保她有一支手枪。好了吗？”

source: Before the sun began to sink I walked back to the other side of the island toward the boats . Across the lagoon I could see the outline of Venice 's horizon of steeples -- particularly the great curving cupola of the Salute , built as a votive to the Virgin for ending the great plague of 1630 . Beneath her foundation a million pilings held her fast and afloat . Was n't Venice still a city of miracles ? A survivor of catastrophes , flood , contagion ? I stopped into a shop and bought a trayful of pastries to bring for dessert , selecting ones I knew Aless liked . Then I went next door and set the package on the bar . I ordered a wine , then drank a second .
domestication: 我在太阳落山前走回到了岛的另一边，那里停靠着船只。渡过泻湖，我可以看到威尼斯地平线上教堂尖塔的剪影，特别是萨卢特大教堂那宏伟的弧形圆顶，它是为了纪念圣母终结1630年的大瘟疫而建造的。它的基础下面，有一百万根桩子把它牢牢地固定住，使其高高耸立在水面上。难道威尼斯不还成了一座奇迹之城吗？它经历了无数次灾难、洪水、瘟疫，却依然屹立不倒。我走进一家店铺，买了一盘糕点，打算带回去作为甜点，我特意挑选了亚历斯喜欢吃的那些口味。然后，我去了隔壁，把包裹放在了吧台上。接着，我点了一杯酒，喝完后又喝了第二杯。酒精的作用开始发挥，我的心情也变得轻松起来。

source: Grace started to shake . The walls of her house had returned to what they truly were , just wood , growing in a forest , dying , disintegrating . In one night , years of human pettiness were annihilated -- never existed . Because of combustion . That 's all it took . Against that fact of the universe Grace was nothing at all .
domestication: 格蕾丝开始发抖起来，她家里的墙壁恢复了本来面目——只是森林里生长的木头，枯萎、腐烂。短短一夜之间，多年积累的人类琐碎算计都被湮没——仿佛从未存在过。仅仅因为着火，这就是一切的原因。在宇宙的这种真理面前，格蕾丝根本不值一提。
foreignization: 格蕾丝开始颤抖。她的房子的墙壁已经恢复到它们真正的样子，只是木头，在森林中生长、死亡、腐烂。在一夜之间，多年的人类琐碎之事被摧毁——从未存在过。只因为燃烧。这就是全部。面对宇宙的这一事实，格蕾丝什么也不是。

source: But Hebert was a friendly sort , and he was inclined to like a man who was drinking heavily while the sun was still high overhead . He was perfectly willing to go keep the stranger company , especially because the stranger might decide to buy his new friend a drink , if Hebert could manage to be charming enough .
domestication: 赫伯特其实是个很好相处的人，他喜欢那种白天喝得酩酊大醉的人。他非常乐意去陪陪这个陌生人，特别是如果他能表现出自己的魅力，也许陌生人就会请他喝一杯。这样一来，赫伯特觉得还是挺划算的。

source: She heard the Zippo go off again . He was smoking . Thinking . There was too much dead space . He did n't know what to say . He was trying to psych her up and was out of gas himself . He did n't realize that he had made the final act possible . She was proud of herself . Your friends do sometimes come through .

source: I do n't take up with anybody . Not even a woman . Those places I worked , I would get offers to do things , move stolen goods , handle drugs : people seemed to smell out somehow I 'd made myself available . But I am not ! I am not here , in this city . This city has never seen my face , only the back of a man leaping up the steps that led to the alley near the subway station . It 's said , I know , that you return to the scene of what you did . I never go near , I never walk past that subway station . I 've never been back to those steps . When she screamed after me as I disappeared , I disappeared forever .
domestication: 我从不跟任何人来往，更别说是女人了。在我工作过的地方，总有人想让我帮他们跑私货、贩毒之类的，好像他们有种第六感，知道我可以被利用。但是我不是这样的人，我在这个城市是个隐形人，没人见过我的脸，只看到一个身影匆忙地跳上通往地铁站附近巷子的台阶。人们都说，一个人会回到自己曾经做过事情的地方，但我从来没有靠近过那座地铁站，也没有再走过那些台阶。当她在我消失时大声喊叫，之后我就彻底消失了，仿佛从未存在过一样。
foreignization: 我不跟任何人来往，不论是男人还是女人。在我工作过的地方，我总能得到一些提议，运送偷来的东西，贩卖毒品：人们似乎有办法摸透我的底细，知道我容易被说动。但是我不是这样！我不在这里，在这座城市里。这座城市从未见过我的脸，只见过一个男人跳上通往地铁站附近小巷的楼梯后背。据说，你会回到你做过事情的现场。我从不靠近，从不走过那座地铁站。我再也没有回到过那些楼梯。当她在我消失时在我身后尖叫时，我就永远消失了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I do n't take up with anybody . Not even a woman . Those places I worked , I would get offers to do things , move stolen goods , handle drugs : people seemed to smell out somehow I 'd made myself available . But I am not ! I am not here , in this city . This city has never seen my face , only the back of a man leaping up the steps that led to the alley near the subway station . It 's said , I know , that you return to the scene of what you did . I never go near , I never walk past that subway station . I 've never been back to those steps . When she screamed after me as I disappeared , I disappeared forever .

我从不跟任何人来往，更别说是女人了。在我工作过的地方，总有人想让我帮他们跑私货、贩毒之类的，好像他们有种第六感，知道我可以被利用。但是我不是这样的人，我在这个城市是个隐形人，没人见过我的脸，只看到一个身影匆忙地跳上通往地铁站附近巷子的台阶。人们都说，一个人会回到自己曾经做过事情的地方，但我从来没有靠近过那座地铁站，也没有再走过那些台阶。当她在我消失时大声喊叫，之后我就彻底消失了，仿佛从未存在过一样。

source: " If you mean where was I born , it was at the very tip of Jutland , in a town called Skagen . An ugly place . Still , children are perverse . They 'll love anything . And I was seduced with my first breath . It was the damp salt wind of the sea , which I 've been hungry for ever since . Among the Lapps , in the Finnmark , the flavor is more strongly of fish ; on the island of St. Kilda it 's like when you stick a cut finger in your mouth . In fact , I spent several years on that island , leading what people refer to as the monastic life . Which merely means I spent several years feeling bored in the presence of a higher being . Do I shock you ? "
domestication: 如果你问我出生在哪里，那就是在日德兰半岛的最北端，有个叫斯卡根的小镇。说实话，那是个很丑陋的地方。不过，孩子们就是爱跟大人过不去，他们什么都喜欢。而我从出生那一刻起，就被那里深深吸引了。是大海的潮湿海风，让我从此欲罢不能。在芬马克的拉普人地区，空气中鱼的味道更浓；在圣基尔达岛上，空气就像你把割伤的手指放在嘴里时的感觉。事实上，我在那个岛上生活了几年，过着所谓的清修生活。其实也就是说，我在某种更高存在的面前感到无聊了好几年。你会觉得我太过分了吗？
foreignization: 如果你想知道我出生在哪里，那是在日德兰半岛的最尽头，有一个叫斯卡恩的小镇，一个很丑陋的地方。然而孩子们是乖戾的，他们会喜欢任何东西。而我从出生的第一刻起就被迷住了。那是海洋潮湿的咸风，我从此之后一直渴望着。在萨米人居住的芬马克地区，空气中鱼的味道更浓；在圣基尔达岛上，味道就像把切伤的手指塞进嘴里一样。事实上，我在那个岛上度过了几年，过着人们所说的修道院般的生活。这仅仅意味着我在更高存在的面前感到无聊了好几年。我难道让你震惊了吗？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" If you mean where was I born , it was at the very tip of Jutland , in a town called Skagen . An ugly place . Still , children are perverse . They 'll love anything . And I was seduced with my first breath . It was the damp salt wind of the sea , which I 've been hungry for ever since . Among the Lapps , in the Finnmark , the flavor is more strongly of fish ; on the island of St. Kilda it 's like when you stick a cut finger in your mouth . In fact , I spent several years on that island , leading what people refer to as the monastic life . Which merely means I spent several years feeling bored in the presence of a higher being . Do I shock you ? "

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" If you mean where was I born , it was at the very tip of Jutland , in a town called Skagen . An ugly place . Still , children are perverse . They 'll love anything . And I was seduced with my first breath . It was the damp salt wind of the sea , which I 've been hungry for ever since . Among the Lapps , in the Finnmark , the flavor is more strongly of fish ; on the island of St. Kilda it 's like when you stick a cut finger in your mouth . In fact , I spent several years on that island , leading what people refer to as the monastic life . Which merely means I spent several years feeling bored in the presence of a higher being . Do I shock you ? "

如果你想知道我出生在哪里，那是在日德兰半岛的最尽头，有一个叫斯卡恩的小镇，一个很丑陋的地方。然而孩子们是乖戾的，他们会喜欢任何东西。而我从出生的第一刻起就被迷住了。那是海洋潮湿的咸风，我从此之后一直渴望着。在萨米人居住的芬马克地区，空气中鱼的味道更浓；在圣基尔达岛上，味道就像把切伤的手指塞进嘴里一样。事实上，我在那个岛上度过了几年，过着人们所说的修道院般的生活。这仅仅意味着我在更高存在的面前感到无聊了好几年。我难道让你震惊了吗？

source: But the day I 'm talking about was early spring . The Gallery pears were in blossom , thousands of tiny white camisoles . I was out in front of the Comp Lit compound with Legget , watching the undergrads . We were vaguely aware of the distinctions between them . Mostly , they were just tan calves drifting past .
domestication: 但我要谈的那天是早春时节。画廊里的梨树开花了，成千上万朵小白花就像一件件小内衣在轻轻摇曳。我和Legget站在比较文学系大楼前，正在看着那些大学一年级的学生。我们对他们有一些模糊的了解，但大多数时候，他们只是皮肤黝黑的新生们懒洋洋地从我们面前走过。
foreignization: 但是我所指的那天是早春。画廊的梨树开花了，成千上万件小白罩衫。我和Legget在比较文学院的正门外，观察着本科生们。我们模糊地意识到他们之间的区别。大多数时候，他们只是晒黑皮肤的年轻人在我们身边飘过。

source: " Right . That 's the word . That 's right . You are right to produce a gun in this situation , because of J.A.M . Jeopardy . Ability to cause serious bodily harm/death . Means - the means to do it . Thus , you can use deadly force to stop that from happening . " Then Jim says to a guy who looks sleepy , " Hey come on . Wake up ! "
domestication: “对了，这才是关键。你说得对，在这种情况下拿出枪是正确的，因为有J.A.M的情况存在，也就是说对方有可能造成严重伤害或死亡的危险。这种情况下，有手段去做就可以使用致命武力来制止。而且，你也有能力做到这一点。”接着吉姆对一个看起来昏昏欲睡的人说：“喂，醒醒！该注意点了。”
foreignization: “好。那是关键词。那是对的。在这种情况下，你有理由拿出枪，因为有J.A.M.危险。能力——造成严重身体伤害/死亡。手段——实施的手段。因此，你可以使用致命力量来阻止这种事情的发生。”然后吉姆对一个看起来很困的人说：“嘿，醒醒吧！”

source: They find us there , in one of these places -- they found me and they saved me , they can do anything , they got me in here with papers and a name they gave me ; I buried my name , no one will ever dig it out of me . They told me what they wanted done and they paid me half the money right away . I ate and I had clothes to wear and I had a room in a hotel where people read the menu outside three different restaurants before deciding where to have their meal . There was free shampoo in the bathroom and the key to a private safe where liquor was kept instead of money .
domestication: 他们在那些地方找到我，然后救了我，他们无所不能，他们用文件和他们给我的新身份证明把我带到这里；我已经把过去的名字埋葬了，再也没有人能够从我嘴里挖出它来了。他们告诉我他们需要我做什么，然后立即付给我一半的报酬。我有饭吃，有衣服穿，还有一间酒店里的房间，窗外就有三个餐厅，人们常常会在门口研究菜单再决定去哪家吃饭。浴室里还免费提供洗发水，房间里有一个私人保险柜，里面存放的不是钱，而是酒。
foreignization: 他们在这些地方中的一个找到了我——他们找到了我并救了我，他们可以做任何事，他们给我了一些文件和一个他们给我起的名字，他们让我进来了；我把我的名字埋葬了，没有人会从我这里挖出来。他们告诉我他们想要我做什么，并且他们立即付给我了一半的钱。我吃饱了，我有衣服穿，我在一家酒店里有一间房子，人们在外面读了三个不同的餐厅的菜单，然后决定在哪里吃饭。浴室里有免费的洗发水，还有一个私人保险箱的钥匙，里面存放的是酒而不是钱。

source: " I 'm not putting it off on you , " he said . The pounding was now in his throat . " But I wo n't allow you to interfere with what I need to do . " James said nothing . " And I might add that it might be time for you to start thinking about what you 're going to do when you grow up . It 's a waste of life , and it depresses me severely . "
domestication: 他说：“我不是在推卸责任。”这时他的心跳得厉害。“但是我不会让你干扰我要做的事。”詹姆斯没有说话。他接着说：“而且我想补充一下，是时候你考虑一下长大后要做什么了。这样混日子不仅浪费生命，还让我十分沮丧。”
foreignization: “我不是把它推给你，”他说。敲击声现在在他的喉咙里。“但是我不会让你干扰我需要做的事情。”詹姆斯什么也没说。“而且我可能还会补充一下，也许是时候让你开始思考，当你长大后要做什么了。这是一种浪费生命的行为，这让我感到极度沮丧。”

source: A door creaked . A young woman in a faded blue nightgown , her dark curls bound up in a white kerchief , leaned out the next door , a saucer of milk in her hand . Our eyes met before I was able to turn away , waiting for her door to close again . The only exit was the stairway , and I had to pass her to get there .
domestication: 有一扇门嘎吱一声打开了，接着一个年轻女人探出头来，她穿着一件褪色的蓝色睡衣，头发上系着白色头巾，手里端着一个装着牛奶的碟子。当时我们的视线相遇了一下，但我很快移开了视线，等待她再次关上门。现在唯一的出路就是走楼梯，而我必须从她身边经过。
foreignization: 一扇门嘎吱作响。一个穿着褪色的蓝色睡衣的年轻女人，她黑色的卷发扎在一块白头巾里，身体倚出旁边的门，手里端着一个装有牛奶的碟子。在我有机会移开视线之前，我们的眼神相遇，我等待她再次关上她的门。唯一的出口是楼梯，我必须从她身边经过才能到达那里。

source: Dora sort of knew Brenda was beside the kitchen door trying to get Dora 's attention , always trying to boss Dora around so Dora ignored her until Brenda came over and pulled her by the arm . " OK , OK , " Dora said , bossing back in her way . By the time Dora returned to watch the man again , he had already paid the cashier and gone . The shadow of his truck still loomed through the window . It was his coat she knew still hanging on a peg by the door . She found a pack of candy corn in the pocket and then hurried out to find him .

source: Stef had been a colicky baby , a poor student , too restless and impatient to sit still in class , to pay attention to anything that did n't feature her at its center . As an adult , nothing had changed . Stef was Marnie 's only child , nearing her fiftieth birthday , as unsettled now as she had been as a hormone-driven adolescent . Yet she managed to express through painting what eluded her in life .

source: On the eve of my departure , I took Basha to Katowice 's toniest bistro . We ordered coq au vin and tenderloin braised in anisette . I had hoped to take a last stroll on the plaza , but by the end of the meal , Basha 's complexion looked like cement . She barely touched her food . Back at home , Mamu prepared her tea and got her to take aspirin and to lie down .
domestication: 我离开前的晚上，我带巴莎去卡托维兹市最豪华的餐厅。我们点了红酒鸡和用茴香酒炖的菲力牛排。我本想最后在广场上散步一下，但饭吃完后，巴莎的脸色就像水泥一样。我勉强让她吃了几口。回到家后，妈妈给她泡茶，让她吃了些阿司匹林，然后让她躺下休息。

source: There were gardens in the City . Some must have been there to begin with , parks with curious tapering pines and thin stone statues . But the gardens had overgrown themselves and spread , and elsewhere groves of weeds , bushes , and trees had sometimes seeded in the walls and avenues . Even so , the City , beyond certain areas of rubble , drifts of dust , old leaves , the ground-down shale of fallen marble , was tidy , spacious , and uncluttered .
domestication: 这座城市里有花园，一些可能是最早就有的，有些古怪的松树和瘦骨嶙峋的石像。但是这些花园已经长得乱七八糟，到处都有杂草、灌木和树木，它们常常在墙壁和大道上自生自长。尽管如此，这个城市除了某些地方的碎石、尘土飞扬、落叶遍地、碎裂的大理石外，仍然显得整洁宽敞，无一丝杂乱。就好像城市在努力保持着自己的干净面貌，只是被自然的力量悄悄地侵蚀着。
foreignization: 城市里有花园。有些花园一定是从一开始就存在的，里面种着奇怪的、逐渐变细的松树和薄的石像。但是这些花园已经超出了它们原来的范围并蔓延开来，而在其他地方，杂草、灌木丛和树木有时会在墙壁和大道上长出来。尽管如此，城市除了某些地区的碎石、沙尘、旧叶子和被碾碎的大理石外，是整洁、宽敞、无杂物的。

source: We made love in our muggy pension room , lathered one another in the shower , then returned to the plaza to feel the breeze on our limbs , which were sore in secret places , to watch the stars against the drape of night and browse the stalls of painted eggs and cigarette cases . The cafes were open , the tabletops lit by bouncing candles .
domestication: 我们在狭窄的旅馆房间里忘情地做爱，之后又一起洗了个痛快的澡，然后回到广场上，感受凉爽的微风吹过身体，虽然有些隐秘的地方还有点酸痛，但看着夜空中闪烁的星星，逛着那些彩绘鸡蛋和香烟盒的摊位，感觉很惬意。街上的咖啡馆都还开着门，桌子上蜡烛的光线忽明忽暗，显得格外浪漫。
foreignization: 我们在我们潮湿的寄宿舍房间里做爱，然后在淋浴时互相搓洗身体，之后又回到广场上，让微风吹拂我们的四肢，四肢上有秘密的地方感到疼痛，凝视着夜幕中闪烁的星星，并浏览绘有图案的鸡蛋和香烟盒的摊位。咖啡馆都是开放的，桌面被蜡烛光照亮。

The cafes were open , the tabletops lit by bouncing candles .
我们在狭窄的旅馆房间里忘情地做爱，之后又一起洗了个痛快的澡，然后回到广场上，感受凉爽的微风吹过身体，虽然有些隐秘的地方还有点酸痛，但看着夜空中闪烁的星星，逛着那些彩绘鸡蛋和香烟盒的摊位，感觉很惬意。街上的咖啡馆都还开着门，桌子上蜡烛的光线忽明忽暗，显得格外浪漫。

source: Breakfast , to her increasing dismay , began no differently from any other mornings . Solomon gulped his milk-warm , frothy , and smelling barny the way he liked it-and then spooned up his flummery in great slurps . Mr. Bates came down at his accustomed time without any special greeting . But surprisingly he was dressed in his Sunday suit . This was not the Sabbath nor some holy day , yet here he was dressed for church .
domestication: 早餐时分，和往常一样，索罗门一如既往地大口喝着温热的牛奶，边喝边发出“咕嘟”声，牛奶上面还冒着热气，带着浓浓的麦芽味，他喜欢这种味道。接着，他又狼吞虎咽地吃掉了他的甜粥。贝茨先生在他平常的时间下楼，没有任何特别的问候。但是让人意外的是，他竟然穿着星期天的礼服。今天明明不是星期日，也不是什么节日，但他却穿着整齐的教堂服装。这种出乎意料的打扮，让人有些摸不着头脑。

source: Adrenaline poured coolly into his gut till it seemed a chasm had opened . Black tunnel where wind shrilled . Such terrible vulnerability . Jeffrey knew the feeling . It was what he 'd felt in those last several weeks before Jeff Jr . left the house . His son 's debauchery had torn at his fatherly guts with incredible destruction . And the emptiness gaped most ruthlessly as he stood at the pulpit a week before J. J. moved away-as he confessed his son 's mortal sinfulness to the congregation . Took the boy 's sins upon himself .

source: That 's right , is n't it ! How could I have forgotten ? I glance through the open doorway at the kitchen counter , surprisingly orderly and clean , arrayed with spotless , sharp knives . “你们想知道我的黑斑怎么回事？”詹姆斯说。“老实说，我父母家有个游泳池，简直太爽了。在后院里，我就泡在那里九天，跟我妈一起看电视节目。她在那里放了个电视，边看边晒太阳，她现在看起来跟破旧的皮革一样。与此同时，我爸就坐在客厅里拉上窗帘，看着老式的超级碗比赛录像。我咬舌头，发誓，他有几十盘这样的录像带，只缺四场。他吓得要命，吃的安定药比吃饭还多，搞得他整个身子都像松木做的一样。”

" You want to know about my tan ? " said James . " Well my parents have a pool , man . In their backyard . Which is where I sat for nine days , man , watching game shows with my mother . She keeps a TV out there so she can work on her tan . She looks like distressed leather . My father , meanwhile , sits in the den with the blinds closed watching , I kid you not , old Super Bowl games on his VCR . He 's got tapes of all but four of however fucking many Super Bowls there are . And he 's scared shitless and he eats so much Valium his flesh is turning to balsa wood . "

“ 你想知道我的晒黑是怎么回事？ ”詹姆斯说：“ 好吧，我的父母有一个游泳池，老兄，在他们的后院。而我就坐在那里九天，老兄，和母亲一起看游戏节目。她在外面放了一个电视，这样她就可以晒黑。她的皮肤看起来就像被风化了的皮革。与此同时，我的父亲就坐在书房里关着百叶窗，观看，老兄，我不是开玩笑，旧的超级碗比赛录像。他有除了四场以外所有超级碗比赛的录像带。而且他吓得要死，吃那么多地西泮，以至于他的肉都变成了巴尔萨木。 ”

source: The days and nights pass quickly this way , and I am ever dizzier and more divided , making love with Wendell , then wandering about with Mira Bai and meditating in Belsize Park . But now the lodger has come back , with her little girl . Did I tell you there 's a little girl ? We are in the old-fashioned basement kitchen where we have all just met . Heather , the child , is a spunky , modern little thing with a spiky , elfin haircut . " Where are you going to sleep ? " she says in her clipped , perfect British child way .
domestication: 就这样，日子和夜晚飞速流逝，我变得越来越头晕目眩，左右为难。一会儿和温德尔缠绵，一会儿又和米拉拜在一起，最后还要在贝尔塞兹公园冥想。但现在房客带着她的小女儿回来了，我有没有跟你提过有个小女儿呢？我们都聚集在老式的地下室厨房里，大家刚刚认识。这个孩子希瑟，是个泼辣、时尚的小东西，剪着一个尖尖的、像精灵一样的发型。“你打算睡哪里？”她用那种快快的、标准的英国童音问道。
foreignization: 这样，日子和夜晚飞速流逝，我变得越来越头晕和分裂，在与温德尔做爱之后，随后与米拉·拜一起漫步，在贝尔赛兹公园进行冥想。但现在房客带着她的小女孩回来了。我有没有告诉你有一个小女孩？我们现在在老式的地下厨房里，我们刚刚见面。希瑟，这个孩子，是一个泼辣、现代的小东西，头发剪得又尖又短。“你要去哪里睡觉？”她以一种简短、完美的英国孩子的方式说。

source: Ask then where we are gone ? It is there we have gone , announced the voice , Into the maw of it . The fault was ours , for we ourselves created it , although in ignorance , unmeaning to , and supposing what we created was its very opposite . Regard the ruin of this city with compassion , for you also , since you have ventured here , must now become the prey of that which murdered us . Be advised , this thing is inescapable . Waste no futile struggle upon evasion . Submit with grace . Soon you will join us in eternal silence . Thus farewell - and greetings .
domestication: 你想知道我们都去哪儿了？答案很简单，我们已经进到了它的深处。我们的灭亡是咎由自取，因为我们自己创造了这个东西，尽管那时我们还不知道它会带来什么后果，甚至以为它正好与我们的初衷相反。看看这座城市的废墟吧，带着同情心，因为你们既然来了，也难逃被它吞噬的命运。记住，这个东西无人能躲过，所以不要白费力气去抵抗，还是放弃挣扎吧。很快，你们就会和我们一起陷入永恒的沉默。就这样，再见——同时，也是问候。
foreignization: 问我们到哪里去了？就是我们去的地方，那声音宣布，进入了它的嘴里。错误是我们的，因为我们自己造成了它，尽管是在无知中，不是故意的，而且以为我们创造的东西是它的对立面。同情地看待这座城市的毁灭，因为你们既然冒险来到这里，现在也必须成为杀死我们的东西的猎物。注意，这件事是不可避免的。不要在徒劳的斗争中浪费时间，去逃避它。带着优雅投降。很快你们就会加入我们，在永恒的沉默中。因此，再见——并问候。

Ask then where we are gone ? It is there we have gone , announced the voice , Into the maw of it . The fault was ours , for we ourselves created it , although in ignorance , unmeaning to , and supposing what we created was its very opposite . Regard the ruin of this city with compassion , for you also , since you have ventured here , must now become the prey of that which murdered us . Be advised , this thing is inescapable . Waste no futile struggle upon evasion . Submit with grace . Soon you will join us in eternal silence . Thus farewell - and greetings .

source: Looking back , I realize that this was my last chance to get to know her . I would never again live at home-apart for occasional visits at Christmas or Independence Day . Sometimes I ca n't help but think that if I 'd only been paying more attention , I might have been prepared for what happened to her later . It might not have happened at all , had I been watching for the signs that I can now only search my memory for .
domestication: 回想起来，我才意识到那是我了解她的最后机会。之后我再也不会和家人一起生活了，只会在圣诞节或国庆节的时候偶尔回去看望。有时候我不禁会想，如果当时我多注意一点，也许就能预料到后来发生的事情，也许那些事情根本就不会发生，只是我当时没发现一些蛛丝马迹，现在只能在记忆里回寻。
foreignization: 回顾过去，我意识到这是我了解她的最后机会。我将永远不会再在家里居住，除了偶尔在圣诞节或国庆日的拜访。有时候我不禁会想，如果我当时更加注意观察，也许我会为她后来发生的事情做好准备。如果我一直在寻找现在只能在记忆中搜索的那些迹象，也许根本不会发生这样的事情。

source: The tiger glared at Brian Donovan , its jaws stretched wide enough to engulf his head . He rubbed it with his boot and swirled his glass of lemonade , grateful for the reassuring chink of ice cubes on such a hot day . Teddy Roosevelt had at least a dozen other hunting trophies here , plus hundreds of books . They could send his conversation off in a thousand unpredictable directions .
domestication: 老虎怒目圆睁地盯着布莱恩·唐纳文，它张开的大嘴足以吞下他的整个头。他用靴子轻轻揉了揉老虎，喝了一口柠檬水，清脆的冰块撞击声在这样一个酷热的日子里让他感到很欣慰。西奥多·罗斯福在这里至少还有十几个其他猎物纪念品，再加上成百上千本书。只要提到这些，他就能让谈话朝着一千个不可预测的方向发展。
foreignization: 老虎瞪着布莱恩·唐纳文，它的下颚张得足以吞没他的头。他用他的靴子擦拭它，并在玻璃杯中搅动柠檬水，对于如此炎热的一天，冰块碰撞的声音让他感到安慰。西奥多·罗斯福在这里至少还有十几个其他猎物奖杯，还有数百本书。他们可以让他的谈话朝着一千个不可预测的方向发展。

source: Alessandro was the first Venetian I 'd ever befriended . Early on , he 'd taken me on little expeditions , revealing niches only a native would know -- secret shortcuts and tiny candlelit shrines , dark doorways where opera divas slipped away from their adoring fans , abandoned docks where the dead were once piled high during the plagues . He was also the first friend I 'd ever had who was zero positive .

source: Why am I telling you this ? And who are you anyway ? Perhaps you 're Violet . I would like to tell all these things to Violet Evelyn Smith - my life , my feelings for her , my advice to her , my wisdom if I can give myself credit for having any . What would she think of me talking to her this way ? But we sort of do talk to each other like this . Or without saying it in words we say it in glances , smiles , pats of the hand , comfortable shrugs . She likes me , I can say that . It 's only for now , it 's only here , I 'm not expecting more .
domestication: 我跟你说这些做什么呢？你到底是谁呢？也许你就是薇奥莱特。我有很多话想对她说，我自己的生活、对她的感受、对她的建议，如果我可以这么说的话，还有我的人生经验。我想知道，如果我跟她说这些，她会怎么想？不过我们两个的确经常像这样聊天。不一定说出来，只是一个眼神、一丝微笑、手臂一碰或者一个轻松的耸肩，她都能懂。至少现在，她还喜欢我，我只能说是这样子。毕竟这只是一时的感觉，在这里的感觉，我也没指望更多。

source: I stood , and Mamu looked me over . I could see Basha watching us , the slowing of her breath . Mamu shook my hand and announced , in her wobbly English , that she was delighted to meet me . source: Sophie in her billowing house dress , with the sticky gray hair and double chin , was n't an attractive sight . Visually it 's much easier talking to Mario . source: " Angela , " he said . His voice lurched in great noise through the microphone , magnification of his inner terror . He stretched a quailing hand toward her , watched her stepping up to the pulpit beside him , felt the water flooding his eyes as she gripped his arm , heard the ripple of uneasiness in the congregation .
domestication: "安吉拉，”他说，他的声音通过麦克风传来，声音很大，夸张地表现出他内心的恐惧。他颤抖着手向她伸去，看着她走上讲台站在他旁边，当她握住他的胳膊时，他感到眼泪要涌出来了，人们的低声议论中也弥漫着不安的情绪。
foreignization: “安吉拉，”他说。他的声音在麦克风中发出巨大的噪音，这是他内心恐惧的放大。他伸出颤抖的手朝她伸去，看着她走上讲坛站在他身边，当她握住他的手臂时，他感到眼里涌起了泪水，听到会众中传来不安的波动。

source: We still have a quarter hour of sunset to watch . Now the red glow spills over Em 's anxious face and softens it . She 's as frail-looking as her mother . I think of her as genuinely frail because she 's my daughter . She 's elongated like me , sort of a medieval saint who needs more flesh on her bones . Food does n't stick to Em . She had an awkward string-bean adolescence . Here we sit now on two moulded plastic chairs like people all over the world at this time of evening .
domestication: 我们还剩下一刻钟的日落时间可以观赏。现在，红色的光芒洒在艾姆紧张的脸上，柔和了她的表情。她看起来跟她母亲一样纤细。我觉得她很娇弱，因为她是我女儿。她身材像我一样，像中世纪圣徒一样需要多吃点肉才能丰满一点。食物似乎从不在她身上“停留”。她经历了一个尴尬的青春期，身材像豆芽一样单薄。现在，我们坐在这里，两把塑料椅子上，就像世界各地的其他人一样，在这个时候享受傍晚的宁静。

source: The congregation shot to its feet in an awesome collective tremor . Mrs. Osborne pounded the keys with a force Jeffrey had never suspected to be lurking in her seventy-year-old fingers . Jones led the people in a quick , syncopated clapping , darting back and forth across the altar , and all those two-hundred bodies became one frenetic body , all those voices one tremendous voice , singing loud : Our God is an awesome God ! The huge din vibrated through Jeffrey 's limbs .
domestication: 教堂里突然一片哗然，大家同时站了起来，就像一股强大的地震席卷了整个场所。奥斯本夫人猛烈地敲打着琴键，杰弗里简直不敢相信这来自七十岁的老太太的手中蕴含着如此大的力量。琼斯带领众人进行了一段快速而富有节奏的掌声，来回穿梭于祭坛之间，而两百多个身体仿佛合成了一个狂热的实体，所有的声音汇聚成一个惊人的声音，大声唱道：“我们的上帝是伟大的上帝！”这阵震耳欲聋的喧闹声让杰弗里的四肢都在振动。
foreignization: 会众以一种令人敬畏的集体颤抖突然站了起来。奥斯本夫人用七十岁的手指敲击键盘，杰弗里从未怀疑她竟然拥有如此强大的力量。琼斯带领大家快速地打着切分拍子，来回穿梭在祭坛上，两百个身体变成一个狂热的身体，那些声音变成一个强大的声音，大声唱道：我们的上帝是伟大的上帝！巨大的喧闹通过杰弗里的四肢振动。

The congregation shot to its feet in an awesome collective tremor . Mrs. Osborne pounded the keys with a force Jeffrey had never suspected to be lurking in her seventy-year-old fingers . Jones led the people in a quick , syncopated clapping , darting back and forth across the altar , and all those two-hundred bodies became one frenetic body , all those voices one tremendous voice , singing loud : Our God is an awesome God ! The huge din vibrated through Jeffrey 's limbs .

source: " Mozart ? You must be in some slow-down time zone . Who 's got that kind of patience ? I remember the days when -- shit , oh , you know . But time gallops , even in jail . A year is a day . " She heard him flip his Zippo , click the little carbon wheel , and heard the small dull bag of ignition , a small explosion , then heard him click the lighter shut and take a drag off a cigarette . He said , " Has what's-her-face , the helper , gone ? "
domestication: 莫扎特？你一定是生活在慢节奏的时区吧。谁会有那么多耐心呢？我记得以前的日子——算了，你也知道的。但即使在监狱里，时间也飞逝而过，一年就像一天一样。 她听到他打开打火机，转动火轮，然后听到了点火的微弱声音，接着听到他关上打火机并吸了一口香烟。他问道：“那个什么来着的帮手走了吗？”
foreignization: 莫扎特？你一定是在某个减速带区域。谁有那种耐心？我记得当时——该死的，哦，你知道。但是时间飞逝，即使在监狱里。一年就是一天。”她听到他打开了他的打火机，点击小碳轮，并且听到了一声小而沉闷的点火声，一阵小爆炸，然后听到他关上打火机并从香烟中吸了一口。他说：“那个什么名字的女人，那个帮手，离开了吗？”
